name: Team Beto
subject: Look how far we’ve come since January (brand-new poll)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Public Policy Polling has been surveying our race for nine months now.
Today, their updated numbers came out, and it shows Beto down by only
three points. But more important -- look at how much ground we’ve covered
and how we’ve cut into Ted Cruz’s lead since January:

PPP Poll (Jan. 18)
Difference: Cruz by 8

--------------------------------------------

PPP Poll (Jun. 8)
Difference: Cruz by 6

--------------------------------------------

PPP Poll (Aug. 3)
Difference: Cruz by 4

--------------------------------------------

PPP Poll (Sep. 20)
Difference: Cruz by 3

This is HUGE. With sheer hard work, hustle and an unstoppable
determination, we’ve cut Cruz’s lead by more than half. Without PACs,
without consultants, without special interests. It’s all been thanks to
tens of thousands of grassroots supporters like you making calls to voters
and pitching in $5, $10, $15 bucks at a time to power our campaign.

This news couldn’t have come at a better time. Tomorrow, Beto and Cruz
will face off for the very first time on the debate stage, a chance for us
to build on our momentum and ultimately take the lead by the next time PPP
surveys the race.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7899?refcode=em20180920&t=1019&akid=11629%2E444211%2E80T9OD ]Before Beto takes the debate stage, show him you’ve got his back with
a grassroots donation of
$3.
We’ve come this far and we can’t stop now.

Your support has made it possible for us to get within striking distance
of winning this race. We’ve made up five points already but can’t fall a
single point short come Election Day. With just a few weeks to go, we’re
counting on you to step up for Beto.

Thanks,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/7899?refcode=em20180920&t=1020&akid=11629%2E444211%2E80T9OD ]Contribute
$3

name: Tabitha Isner for Congress
subject: Does it matter that I'm a woman?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Dear Friend,

I get asked a lot why it is that so many women are running for office. (AL.com interviewed me about it just yesterday!) And my usual response is that I can’t speak for other women, but for me, I’m not running because I’m a woman. I’m running because there are things in this country that need doing. And if running is what it takes to get them done, then I’ll do it.

But in the midst of #MeToo and Kavanaugh’s hearing and the lingering echo of Trump’s Access Hollywood tape, perhaps there is something important about this trend in women candidates.

We obviously don’t know exactly where the truth lies in the Dr. Ford / Judge Kavanaugh situation, but I’m inclined to side with Dr. Ford. Why? Because I empathize with her. So many of us have experienced sexual assault and not told anyone, or at least not reported it to law enforcement. So many of us have tried talking about it only to be questioned, doubted, and disbelieved.

Even while on the campaign trail, I’ve experienced countless unwanted touches, kisses, and squeezes. Plus, of course, there are all the propositions and comments about my body. And, I’m sorry to say, time and again I let it slide. I laugh it off or quietly walk away. Because I have work to do. Work that is too important to be slowed down by the arduous process of filing complaints or pressing charges – or even just calling people out.

But that’s only part of why I let it slide. Just as importantly, I let it slide because I know that if I make a fuss about it, that powerful man (or his powerful friends or heck, even the Sheriff) will not only NOT support my candidacy, they’ll ridicule me. They’ll not only NOT help me, they’ll shame me for “making it up,” for “playing the woman card,” for “claiming the victim.”

I know this to be true because I see it happening all around me.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/This%20is%20an%20actual%20meme%20floating%20around%20Facebook%20these%20days..png]

I know better, of course. And I’m grateful for the many allies and friends that have reassured me and others that our experiences are real.
But the halls of Congress are – unfortunately – not filled with allies and friends. They are filled, primarily, with powerful men who have been able - knowingly or unknowingly - to silence women for far too long.

And it’s not just about sexual assault and harassment. It’s also about employment policies that are unfair to women, healthcare policies that are unfair to women, and economic policies that are unfair to women. These policies will only be changed by having people in office that understand the countless ways – small and large – in which women are silenced, undermined, and exploited.

So while I have a lot of things I want to get done, and not all of them are about my gender... Yes, it does matter that I’m a woman. And I'm looking forward to a pink wave coming to Washington.

Excited to send a woman to Congress? #MeToo

name: Melania Trump
subject: I never envisioned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
From the moment my husband, Donald, placed his hand on the bible |
---
| | | | | | |
Friend,

>From the moment my husband, Donald, placed his hand on the bible and took the oath of office to serve as America's President, he has worked nonstop to deliver on his promises.

Democrats and the opposition media are doing everything they possibly can to discredit Donald with false accusations by spreading their fake news and making it appear that he does not have the support of America's voters.

**[That is why I am asking that you join my husband as he fights for our nation by signing your Presidential Pledge of Support.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=091dcb446c2eb4749983e8a66210b61c61eac4666d01b289d5a7d5ea1aa5577ba66e5270d049ecff9190dab1efd2241578935ba042283e9b)**

Up until a few years ago, I never envisioned that I would one day serve our nation as First Lady.

Everything you and I believe in regarding the future of America is on the line in the coming months. _This is a battle we must win together._

I'm asking you and other Americans across the country to personally register your support and help prove that the Democrats and media are wrong.

**[Please sign your Presidential Pledge of Support. I look forward to telling Donald that you are standing with him.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=091dcb446c2eb47428a64cbf576cdef8f10019c36ccc40f3b7138f4b78d85decfba2148b572b5e264544dcdc75cc23bfe3991d76547bf9a3)**

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Up against McConnell in ND
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
This could not be more important, Friends: My friend Heidi Heitkamp is running for reelection in North Dakota, and **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight just said a voter in North Dakota has __27_ times_ more power to decide Senate control. **

That means everything is riding on what happens in North Dakota, but recent polling shows Heidi trailing her GOP opponent, and 21 right-wing groups are spending almost $10 million to defeat her.

Heidi's race in 2012 was the closest Senate race that year - she won by just under 3,000 votes, so she needs our immediate grassroots support to fight back against Mitch McConnell and the GOP's deep-pocketed donors.
**I told Heidi we could help her raise another $15,000 before midnight - so I'm counting on top supporters like you to step up immediately and help Heidi close the gap now. ****[Please, will you donate $5 right now to](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk911-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)****[reelect Heidi Heitkamp in North Dakota and take back the Senate for Democrats in November?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk911-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Dow, S&P Surge to Record Closes as Economy Steams Ahead
body:
| |
---
#
# **_Dow, S &P Surge to Record Closes as Economy Steams Ahead_**
****
In _The Washington Post_ , Thomas Heath writes that the "U.S. stock markets smashed records Thursday” as the economy continues to flourish. Heath notes that “it’s the S&P’s 19th record close this year and its 89th since the 2016 elections. The Dow recorded its 12th new closing high of the year and its 100th new high since the presidential election.” **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtonpost.com/business/economy/dow-sandp-surge-to-record-closes-as-economy-steams-ahead/2018/09/20/00a95a3a-bd10-11e8-be70-52bd11fe18af_story.html)** “The number of Americans filing for unemployment benefits unexpectedly fell last week, hitting near a 49-year low in a sign the job market remains strong,” _[**Reuters**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/reuters-u-s-weekly-jobless-claims-fall-as-labor-market-strength-continues/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr)_ reports. “Initial claims for state unemployment benefits fell by 3,000 to a seasonally adjusted level of 201,000 for the week ended Sept. 15, the Labor Department said on Thursday. That is the lowest level since November 1969.” “The federal government has more authority to go on offense against foreign adversaries under a new cybersecurity strategy signed by President Donald Trump, officials said Thursday,” David Jackson writes in [**_USA Today_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2018/09/20/donald-trumps-new-cybersecurity-plan-allows-more-offensive-operations/1370946002/). “We are going to do a lot of things offensively. Our adversaries need to know that,” National Security Adviser John Bolton said. “President Trump announced Thursday the names of two American soldiers from the Korean War identified from troop remains given to U.S. by North Korea earlier this year,” Diana Stancy Correll writes in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/trump-identifies-two-us-soldiers-from-remains-provided-by-north-korea). “Army Master Sgt. Charles H. McDaniel, 32, or Vernon, Indiana, and Army Pfc. William H. Jones, 19, of Nash County, North Carolina, are the first American remains from......North Korea to be identified as a result of my Summit with Chairman Kim,” President Trump tweeted. “These HEROES are home, they may Rest In Peace, and hopefully their families can have closure.” “President Trump has made addressing drug demand and the opioid crisis a top priority of his administration,” writes [**Deputy Director of the Office of National Drug Control Policy Jim Carroll**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/trump-administration-makes-crisis-next-door-top-priority/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) in the _Columbus Dispatch_. The President is “dedicating unprecedented funding to address this crisis, including making sure states and communities have the resources they need to prevent drug use, treat addiction locally and stop the flow of drugs into their communities.” “One year ago, a devastating Category 4 hurricane made landfall just south of the Yabucoa Harbor in Puerto Rico,” writes [**Secretary of Homeland Security Kirstjen M. Nielsen**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/reflecting-year-recovery-puerto-rico/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) in the _Miami Herald_. “FEMA and its federal partners were in Puerto Rico before Hurricane Maria made landfall, supported response efforts, and will stay there for years to come, supporting the government’s recovery efforts and helping Puerto Rican communities.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTIxLjk1MjAwMjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyMS45NTIwMDIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzg5MTY2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

Heath notes that “it’s the S&P’s 19th record close this year and its 89th since the 2016 elections. The Dow recorded its 12th new closing high of the year and its 100th new high since the presidential election.” ** “The number of Americans filing for unemployment benefits unexpectedly fell last week, hitting near a 49-year low in a sign the job market remains strong,” reports. “Initial claims for state unemployment benefits fell by 3,000 to a seasonally adjusted level of 201,000 for the week ended Sept. 15, the Labor Department said on Thursday. That is the lowest level since November 1969.” “The federal government has more authority to go on offense against foreign adversaries under a new cybersecurity strategy signed by President Donald Trump, officials said Thursday,” David Jackson writes in . “We are going to do a lot of things offensively. Our adversaries need to know that,” National Security Adviser John Bolton said. “President Trump announced Thursday the names of two American soldiers from the Korean War identified from troop remains given to U.S. by North Korea earlier this year,” Diana Stancy Correll writes in the . “Army Master Sgt. Charles H. McDaniel, 32, or Vernon, Indiana, and Army Pfc. William H. Jones, 19, of Nash County, North Carolina, are the first American remains from......North Korea to be identified as a result of my Summit with Chairman Kim,” President Trump tweeted. “These HEROES are home, they may Rest In Peace, and hopefully their families can have closure.” “President Trump has made addressing drug demand and the opioid crisis a top priority of his administration,” writes in the Columbus Dispatch. The President is “dedicating unprecedented funding to address this crisis, including making sure states and communities have the resources they need to prevent drug use, treat addiction locally and stop the flow of drugs into their communities.” “One year ago, a devastating Category 4 hurricane made landfall just south of the Yabucoa Harbor in Puerto Rico,” writes in the Miami Herald. “FEMA and its federal partners were in Puerto Rico before Hurricane Maria made landfall, supported response efforts, and will stay there for years to come, supporting the government’s recovery efforts and helping Puerto Rican communities.” | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Early Voting Starts TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
This is a critical election year. Your vote is more important than ever, and **starting today, you can cast your ballot.** That's because early voting began today across Minnesota.
Minnesota makes it easy to **[vote by mail](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lTOHG5asi76lMazjSxCDrKDWnQAs2pmp)** , vote early, or vote on Election Day. **[I'm counting on you to do your part and make a plan to vote this year.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HKNINa9m85y7q0sG%2FKDVf6DWnQAs2pmp)**
Everything is on the line over these next 46 days. Stand up for what's right, protect Americans' health care, combat climate change, and safeguard our democracy by **[making a plan to vote this year.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zIapQpXURpq73HRJFOHr3qDWnQAs2pmp)**
You've always had my back -- and I'm counting on you to be there for me once again in this big election.
Thanks,
Amy
P.S. **Minnesota makes it easy to vote early, vote by mail, or vote on Election Day.[Make a plan to do your part by voting in this important election.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9QCIW9JD%2FbruMY9z8%2FJlb6DWnQAs2pmp)**
[**Contribute**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2u%2F%2Bf37SKhAHn8PiP9jZ9KDWnQAs2pmp)

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: worried (polls say we're losing Missouri)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi -- One race that makes us really nervous is Claire McCaskill's in Missouri.
**The most recent poll shows her BEHIND by one point, and Trump is doing everything he can to rally voters around her opponent.**
We told her we'd help raise $10,000 for her campaign so that she can retake the lead, but we're not there yet and could really use your help. name: Jeff Sheridan, WolfForPa.com
subject: Hey, your name is missing (sign the card for Obama)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for GovernorContributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hello,

We're all so excited to host President Obama when he comes to Pennsylvania to campaign with Governor Wolf today.

We've finished up most of the prepwork, but I was checking our card for President Obama and realized your name was missing.

**[If you haven't signed our welcome card for President Obama yet, make sure to add your name now:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec1bd/73a2bc12/271a3047/1fce8257/2799757562/VEsH/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/welcome-president-obama-to-pa-sign-the-card?gpsid=14_50_3752&source=em18_180921_BoWel2_engg_gq_act__js_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_BoWel2_engg_gq_act__js_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf")**

We're thrilled that President Obama is coming to help Governor Wolf win one of the most important elections of this cycle.

We want to make sure he knows how much we appreciate him and his service, and this card is a great way to do that.

**So please, add your name and welcome President Obama back to Pennsylvania today:**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Welcome-Obama-to-PA](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec1bd/73a2bc12/271a3047/1fce8257/2799757562/VEsF/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/welcome-president-obama-to-pa-sign-the-card?gpsid=14_50_3752&source=em18_180921_BoWel2_engg_gq_act__js_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_BoWel2_engg_gq_act__js_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf")**

Thank you,

Jeff Sheridan
Campaign Manager
Tom Wolf for Governor

name: Anne Holton
subject: As a Virginian
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

I was born in Roanoke and spent the first years of my life in Southwest Virginia. When my dad, Linwood Holton, was elected Governor, he and my mom, Jinks, moved the family up to Richmond. At the time, my dad - a Republican - was pushing to desegregate Virginia schools and move our Commonwealth forward. He believed then, and still does today, that Virginia should be a place where every man, woman, and child can thrive - and that's something he and my mom taught us kids as we were growing up.

I tell you all of this because I want you to know how much I care about Virginia, about our shared home.

**I know I email you from time to time to ask you to pitch in to Tim's campaign, and I often talk about what I've seen Tim do, and how I'm proud of him. And those things are always true - but today, I'm writing you first and foremost as a Virginian.**

I see what Tim's opponent is saying on the news and on his Twitter account. And I'll tell you, I do not like it. He wants to move Virginia backwards to a place I will tell you right now we're not going back to.

And the fact is, we have an opportunity ahead of us to make a statement about who we are and who we aren't. I know who I am, and I know who Tim is, and I can't wait to go vote for him on [November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118c/3e0906/7094ebe0/3e361106/1266490140/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS&source=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS") I'm supporting him as his wife, as an advocate for kids and teachers, as a Democrat, as a parent, as a former legal aid attorney - and most importantly, as a Virginian.

[I hope you'll join me, and make a small online contribution today to support the Virginia we believe in, a Virginia that works for all.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118c/3e0906/7094ebe0/3e36111b/1266490140/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+I+hope+youll+join+me+and+make+a+small+on&utm_campaign=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS&source=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS")

**The month of September is a critical time for any campaign, and we 're in the middle of a fundraising push so your donation will mean the world to us:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118c/3e0906/7094ebe0/3e36111f/1266490140/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS&source=20180921_1_FR_AH_Anne-LDND-RS")

clean_body: | | Derek, I was born in Roanoke and spent the first years of my life in Southwest Virginia. When my dad, Linwood Holton, was elected Governor, he and my mom, Jinks, moved the family up to Richmond. At the time, my dad - a Republican - was pushing to desegregate Virginia schools and move our Commonwealth forward. He believed then, and still does today, that Virginia should be a place where every man, woman, and child can thrive - and that's something he and my mom taught us kids as we were growing up. I tell you all of this because I want you to know how much I care about Virginia, about our shared home. I know I email you from time to time to ask you to pitch in to Tim's campaign, and I often talk about what I've seen Tim do, and how I'm proud of him. And those things are always true - but today, I'm writing you first and foremost as a Virginian. I see what Tim's opponent is saying on the news and on his Twitter account. And I'll tell you, I do not like it. He wants to move Virginia backwards to a place I will tell you right now we're not going back to. And the fact is, we have an opportunity ahead of us to make a statement about who we are and who we aren't. I know who I am, and I know who Tim is, and I can't wait to go vote for him on "" I'm supporting him as his wife, as an advocate for kids and teachers, as a Democrat, as a parent, as a former legal aid attorney - and most importantly, as a Virginian. "" The month of September is a critical time for any campaign, and we 're in the middle of a fundraising push so your donation will mean the world to us: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" "" Thank you so much for reading. Anne * | "" "" ""

name: Team Scholten
subject: ⚡Let’s Shock the World (you should open this)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
It’s been two weeks since we publicly challenged Steve King to debate. He hasn’t accepted yet, but the pressure is growing. Over 1,000 people have signed our petition demanding a debate between J.D. Scholten and Steve King. Earlier this week, the editorial board of the largest paper from the largest city in the district weighed in:
_...A spirited public exchange of ideas has been a hallmark of American politics for generations, offering voters an invaluable opportunity to compare candidates for elected office._
_...King's outspokenness on immigration and other issues, Scholten's robust fundraising and the blue-tinted mood of national voters upset with GOP President Donald Trump all give the Democratic challenger a fighting chance of pulling off an upset. _
_...A public debate, in particular, could help undecided voters make a more informed choice at the ballot box._
_...members of our editorial board repeatedly have called for public debates of candidates for any public office. And, we have taken King to task for shunning debates in the past._
_...Like voters across the country, we believe most all 4th District voters expect and deserve to see the two candidates on the same stage, offering their views and solutions on a myriad of issues facing the district, our state and our nation._
[**_Please join us in keeping the pressure on Steve King to participate in a debate by adding your name HERE!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2269674/12104182/-1480649960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzdiNmZkZi1jM2JkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fm9SjhGVCPV98Stx1U7RpEVSCPMn_g-5a0E9BnfFwFw=)

[**_Share on Facebook HERE._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2269675/12104183/-1675765417?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzdiNmZkZi1jM2JkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fm9SjhGVCPV98Stx1U7RpEVSCPMn_g-5a0E9BnfFwFw=)
[**_Retweet on Twitter HERE._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2269676/12104184/1979337590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzdiNmZkZi1jM2JkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fm9SjhGVCPV98Stx1U7RpEVSCPMn_g-5a0E9BnfFwFw=)
Let’s keep pushing Steve King to give the voters the debate they deserve!
Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten

name: Jason Yates
subject: We need your help!
body:
| | 5 action items you can do right now
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaDyqlKk5PWlx-E94LM-jfBRb9Ts_n1mDD4_YawR97Kaj1TEWzMVJUb3eLY7osQZ5u7oe2up05WA0JC_LOVGfkM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180921com01&n=1)
| Peter, Many of you have asked what you can do to roll-up your sleeves and get involved this election season. So glad you asked! We have 5 specific ways you can make a powerful impact this election. There is no one better than you to reach your neighborhood, your friends and family, and your church community to register and vote! We can all do something to be part of creating a powerful movement of faith in action to make a difference in the public square. **Please prayerfully consider getting involved in one or more of the ways listed below:**
1. Contact Your Pastor and Help Equip Your Church
2. Share the Personal Voting Assistant with Friends and Family
3. Become A Social Media Influencer
4. Organize A Voter Mobilization Drive
5. Commit to Pray

Get the resources we've created for each of these 5 ways to be involved [here on our website](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaDyqlKk5PWlx-E94LM-jfBRb9Ts_n1mDD4_YawR97Kaj1TEWzMVJUb3eLY7osQZ5u7oe2up05WA0JC_LOVGfkM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180921com01&n=2). Thank you for turning your faith into action to help other Christians understand the importance of their votes and their voices in our community and our nation! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaDyqlKk5PWlx-E94LM-jfBRb9Ts_n1mDD4_YawR97Kaj1TEWzMVJUb3eLY7osQZ5u7oe2up05WA0JC_LOVGfkM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180921com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180921com01&n=4) P.S. You can start by forwarding this email to others who are ready to roll-up their sleeves and take action with you!
* * *
_Don't have time to get involved?[Donate to My Faith Votes](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/getinvolved?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180921com01&n=5) today and support our mission to make the 2018 Midterm Elections the largest turnout of Christian voters ever seen!_

clean_body: | | 5 action items you can do right now | Peter, Many of you have asked what you can do to roll-up your sleeves and get involved this election season. So glad you asked! We have 5 specific ways you can make a powerful impact this election. There is no one better than you to reach your neighborhood, your friends and family, and your church community to register and vote! We can all do something to be part of creating a powerful movement of faith in action to make a difference in the public square. Please prayerfully consider getting involved in one or more of the ways listed below: 1. Contact Your Pastor and Help Equip Your Church 2. Share the Personal Voting Assistant with Friends and Family 3. Become A Social Media Influencer 4. Organize A Voter Mobilization Drive 5. Commit to Pray Get the resources we've created for each of these 5 ways to be involved . Thank you for turning your faith into action to help other Christians understand the importance of their votes and their voices in our community and our nation! United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO P.S. You can start by forwarding this email to others who are ready to roll-up their sleeves and take action with you! Don't have time to get involved? today and support our mission to make the 2018 Midterm Elections the largest turnout of Christian voters ever seen! ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Dana Bye
subject: watch our newest ad, “Training”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Our latest television advertisement is about Abigail's commitment to expanding job training opportunities so that every person in our district has an opportunity to succeed.
| | Peter, While Rep. Dave Brat is on TV making false statements about Abigail's positions on the issues, **we are continuing to share her _real_ ideas for improving life in our district.** Earlier this week, we released Abigail's comprehensive good-governance and campaign finance reform platform. And now, we're up with a [**new television advertisement**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ix3l882mwhiBWHaytNEox9pNdq8L_FvA5PjwTrJ-FOU=/KP2p6EiQiJy0mQWqkiq6vo2aIxSKoZvYBkGNRAfgLUA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.21_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) about her commitment to expanding vocational training and apprenticeship opportunities to continue growing Virginia's economy. [_**Watch the ad, and then consider making a grassroots donation, so we can continue to tell voters about Abigail 's ideas to help Central Virginia families:**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ix3l882mwhiBWHaytNEox9pNdq8L_FvA5PjwTrJ-FOU=/KP2p6EiQiJy0mQWqkiq6vo2aIxSKoZvYBkGNRAfgLUA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.21_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ix3l882mwhiBWHaytNEox9pNdq8L_FvA5PjwTrJ-FOU=/KP2p6EiQiJy0mQWqkiq6vo2aIxSKoZvYBkGNRAfgLUA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.21_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) As Abigail says in the ad, every Virginian should have the opportunity to secure a good-paying job and earn a good living -- whether you have a four-year college degree or not. As our representative in Congress, Abigail will fight to expand vocational training opportunities to make sure we all have the chance to succeed. [**I hope you can take a moment to watch the ad, Peter,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ix3l882mwhiBWHaytNEox9pNdq8L_FvA5PjwTrJ-FOU=/KP2p6EiQiJy0mQWqkiq6vo2aIxSKoZvYBkGNRAfgLUA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.21_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) because we're pretty proud of it. This campaign is about the real issues facing Virginia families, and we'll continue to talk about them, and then we will elect Abigail in November, thanks to [**your continued support.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ix3l882mwhiBWHaytNEox9pNdq8L_FvA5PjwTrJ-FOU=/KP2p6EiQiJy0mQWqkiq6vo2aIxSKoZvYBkGNRAfgLUA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.21_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ix3l882mwhiBWHaytNEox9pNdq8L_FvA5PjwTrJ-FOU=/KP2p6EiQiJy0mQWqkiq6vo2aIxSKoZvYBkGNRAfgLUA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.21_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ix3l882mwhiBWHaytNEox9pNdq8L_FvA5PjwTrJ-FOU=/sauICtBpXyXyq_9FMAS5H_dUwNu0-cyvo7-QhBXgUhA=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ix3l882mwhiBWHaytNEox9pNdq8L_FvA5PjwTrJ-FOU=/2B9fCUlu2rNj6phQiczGXCXhv4fRx2J242ZOi1vWDmA=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

Lindsey, cc'ed Brad here too. Looks like we're only about halfway to our Media Fund goal. Could you reach out to supporters this a.m. to see if they can help close the gap?

You can share this link, I'm tracking things here: **_[http://nm.martinheinrich.com/media-fund](http://nm.martinheinrich. Sent from Steve's iPhone

name: Cate Domino, bobcasey.com
subject: we missed the goal -- but there's still a chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6215/51dbcc2a/1ce1b95a/3ab6df5/1578619087/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") I'm not going to lie, team:

We didn't meet our $15,000 match goal before the deadline. Thankfully, our match donors are extending the deadline to midnight tonight. We need to take advantage of this because if we don't, the consequences could be devastating.

Ever since Bob voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, they've really stepped up their attacks. President Trump has smeared Bob on Twitter, at an NRA rally and right here in Pennsylvania. His campaign has already poured money into radio ads, and he won't stop until he replaces Bob with his good friend and longtime supporter Congressman Lou Barletta.

With attacks coming from the very top of the Republican establishment, this campaign needs to be prepared to fight back. But budgets are tight, and right now our advertising is on the chopping block. With 46 days to go, it's getting harder to make up these missed deadlines. That's why this match opportunity is so important: it's a chance for grassroots supporters to come together to make a game-changing investment to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat.

**We don't have much time before the match expires, and there is another $3,200 worth of match dollars to unlock. Can you give $5 to support Bob right now? Every dollar will be doubled.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180921_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 (Becomes $50)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180921_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180921_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks,

Cate

Cate Domino
Digital Director
Bob Casey for Senate

Will you make your first donation to help out?

name: Team Bredesen
subject: Phil needs to hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Hey Peter -- Nowadays, most campaigns are feeding voters poll-tested soundbites and consultant-crafted slogans focused on creating division among voters. It’s no wonder partisan rancor and chaos dominate our politics. Our campaign is different -- we want our message to stay focused on bringing people together and changing the way Washington works. That means we need to know what issues matter most to the grassroots supporters we count on, like you. [**That’s why I’m asking you to complete this very short issues survey -- can you take a moment to let us know what your priorities are in this race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2272859/12127318/244193819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTg1ODY4Yi1kZWJkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIABpgbNBZtEssX3w9cBY7xsEu5dsculpk7vdp6FZ1I=&refcode=em180921-issues-survey) | | [Take our survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2272860/12127319/244193819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTg1ODY4Yi1kZWJkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CIABpgbNBZtEssX3w9cBY7xsEu5dsculpk7vdp6FZ1I=&refcode=em180921-issues-survey)
---
We’ve already sent a few surveys like this in the past few months, and they’ve been an important part of getting feedback as we continue building up our campaign and traveling the state talking to voters.
Phil Bredesen’s priority in this Senate race is keeping our message centered on getting things done for Tennessee communities. That means we need to know what issues matter most to folks like you.
Our first question is below, and you can finish the rest after selecting your answer:
**If you had to pick one issue, which would you say matters most to you and your family right now? Click on a choice below to record your answer:**

clean_body: | Hey Peter -- Nowadays, most campaigns are feeding voters poll-tested soundbites and consultant-crafted slogans focused on creating division among voters. It’s no wonder partisan rancor and chaos dominate our politics. Our campaign is different -- we want our message to stay focused on bringing people together and changing the way Washington works. That means we need to know what issues matter most to the grassroots supporters we count on, like you. | | We’ve already sent a few surveys like this in the past few months, and they’ve been an important part of getting feedback as we continue building up our campaign and traveling the state talking to voters. Phil Bredesen’s priority in this Senate race is keeping our message centered on getting things done for Tennessee communities. That means we need to know what issues matter most to folks like you. Our first question is below, and you can finish the rest after selecting your answer: If you had to pick one issue, which would you say matters most to you and your family right now? Click on a choice below to record your answer: | | | | Thanks for your help and being a part of our campaign. Team Bredesen PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

name: Josh Mahony
subject: We Won't Give Up
body:
Friend,
We have 47 days left until election day and the Republicans think that they have this race in the bag. They have no idea. Over the last year, you and I have been building a movement that is focused on Arkansas's working families. Together we have traversed this district and spoke up for people who need access to affordable healthcare, spoke out against tax breaks for billionaires and their big business buddies, fought back when Steve Womack proposed cutting Social Security and Medicare.
**People like you and me, we won't give up. Across the country, people from all parties and walks of life are waking up to an America that doesn't work for them anymore. And across this country, voters are going to go to the polls and kick out the creators of this broken system. Here at home, we can do that too.**
_In these last 47 days, let's stick to our guns. We have to continue to work up until the very last day. My team and our volunteers are going full speed ahead and to keep up our efforts we need you to pitch in and help us again._ I need you to dig deep and make another contribution. Every $25, $50, $100 goes a long way to sending me to Washington and sending Steve Womack back to Rogers. Can I count you to stand with me?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2272947/12127791/-1826915792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjE1NThiNy1kZmJkLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0NzZkOGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNMg_iPQvz__XYgtAFgHKp89onOpG_E5eW1fExVuRmU=)
Josh

If you believe you received this message in error, please unsubscribe to this list.
Mahony for Congress

name: ALERT@SherrodBrown.com
subject: Trump and special interests helping Renacci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | | | _" My opponent is very close to Trump. Trump has been in campaigning for him. And that means money and it means attention. And the gun lobby always drops millions against me, and we expect that to come in October."_ \-- Sherrod
---
Sherrod's right. Renacci is getting a lot of help -- and by help, we mean financial help -- to win in Ohio. Trump and the special interests are working to boost his campaign.
But this grassroots team doesn't rely on outside spending. And right now we're in danger of going dark if we don't hit our $655,000 FEC goal.
[**Peter -- our double match program is closing at midnight. Will you rush in $5 or more to help us reach our goal in time?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffff8/4462dc26/64624798/201b4f32/414192880/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180921?refcode=sbe180921_m")
[$5 -> $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffff8/4462dc26/64624798/201b4f31/414192880/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180921?refcode=sbe180921_m&amount=5")
**[$10-> $20](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffff8/4462dc26/64624798/201b4f30/414192880/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180921?refcode=sbe180921_m&amount=10")
[$26 -> $52](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffff8/4462dc26/64624798/201b4f37/414192880/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180921?refcode=sbe180921_m&amount=26")
[Any amount will be doubled.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffff8/4462dc26/64624798/201b4f32/414192880/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180921?refcode=sbe180921_m")**
Sherrod's right -- we can only expect spending against us to get worse in October.
But we're more concerned about how bad things can be after Election Day if Sherrod loses this race.
Without Sherrod in the Senate, millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions could lose their healthcare if Republicans repeal the Affordable Care Act.
Without Sherrod, women could lose access to reproductive care, or the ability to make their own healthcare decisions.
Without Sherrod, minimum wage workers may not get a living wage. Their collective bargaining rights could be further degraded, and jobs could continue to disappear overseas.
**We need to keep Sherrod right where he is in the Senate -- fighting like hell to make sure none of that happens.**
[**Sherrod is counting on us to hit this goal so we don't need to pull down our TV ads. Remember, everything you give right now will be matched. So give $5, it counts for $10. Give $26, it'll count for $52.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffff8/4462dc26/64624798/201b4f32/414192880/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180921?refcode=sbe180921_m")

---
Thanks!
Team Sherrod

name: Michael Moore
subject: Here's why I tell reporters we may not make it to 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
I know I'm about as subtle as a kick to the groin, but when I said that we're screwed if we don't mobilize the grassroots, I meant it.
#
Friends,
Earlier this week I wrote to you - I pleaded with you - to wake up, get mad, and raise hell. I know I'm about as subtle as a kick to the groin, but when I said that we're screwed if we don't mobilize the grassroots, I meant it.
Why? Because when reporters ask me if I think we can beat President Donald Trump in 2020, here's what I tell them: If we don't radically fix our democracy right now, we may not get to 2020.
[**If you don't believe the most important fight of our lives needs to happen right now, over the next six weeks, you must be on a different planet. Can you chip in $5, right now, to help hundreds of Our Revolution groups elect real progressives this November?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a930/bed43eb/735f949d/75fcc5fb/380165441/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-film?refcode=em180921&noskip=true")
Do you know who the biggest voting bloc in 2016 was? It was the 100 million voters who stayed at home and didn't vote. If that isn't a national emergency, I don't know what is.
I'll be honest, if we think for one second that we can win this November using the same incremental strategy used by establishment campaigns, we don't stand a chance in hell. The only way we're going to win is through grassroots organizing, neighborhood by neighborhood, door to door. I'm not saying it's easy, but it's not rocket science.
My new movie - Fahrenheit 11/9 - comes out in theaters today. I know it'll make you angry - with Trump, with Wall Street, with multinational corporate criminals, and with the political establishment. But it should also give you the motivation you need to DO something about it before November.
It will be opening in more than 1,700 theaters across the country, the largest ever opening for a non-fiction film. I encourage you all to use this film as an organizing tool - register voters, connect with your neighbors, collect email addresses, or go canvassing straight from the theater!
You haven't shied away from the fights people said were impossible. Instead, you've made them reachable: Medicare for All, tuition-free public college, getting big money out of politics, getting serious about our climate - these are all things we can make happen together.
The political revolution is within reach, but it isn't going to trickle down from the top. The revolution has to come from right here - the people.
[**One way you can help right now is by giving $5 that will go directly to supporting Our Revolution's grassroots organizing.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a930/bed43eb/735f949d/75fcc5fb/380165441/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-film?refcode=em180921&noskip=true")
Hope to see you at the theater this weekend!
In solidarity,
Michael Moore
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a930/bed43eb/735f949d/75fcc5fb/380165441/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moore-film?refcode=em180921&noskip=true")**

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a930/bed43eb/735f949d/75fcc5e5/380165441/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a930/bed43eb/735f949d/75fcc5e4/380165441/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a930/bed43eb/735f949d/75fcc5e7/380165441/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: TK 2018 | Ian Sams, Communications Director
subject: Add your name: No rushed vote on Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | In light of the recent sexual assault allegations made against him, it's more important than ever that we prevent a rushed vote on Judge Kavanaugh. [Add your name if you agree.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118f/3e0906/70e4a473/3e3610aa/3262279861/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180921_2_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree&utm_campaign=20180921_2_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition")

* * *

On [Sunday,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118f/3e0906/70e4a473/3e3610a9/3262279861/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180921_2_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Sunday&utm_campaign=20180921_2_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition") Dr. Christine Blasey Ford went public with previously anonymous charges against Judge Brett Kavanaugh - that he sexually assaulted her in the early 1980s when they were high school students. Her letter details very serious charges, and even provides corroboration including therapist notes and polygraph results.

Regardless of how they felt about Judge Kavanaugh before these allegations came to light, it is now imperative that Senate Republicans take a step back and address this. **_There is no legitimate reason to jam through a vote and rush through an incomplete investigative process._**

The Judiciary Committee and the Senate have an obligation to take these charges seriously. Dr. Ford submitted a letter to Senators, which is now in Judge Kavanaugh's FBI background file. She went on the record with documentation. She has asked for the FBI to reopen its investigation into Kavanaugh to review this matter prior to a Senate hearing - and there is much indication by Republicans at this point that she will be denied that. At the very least, Senate Republicans must allow the time and space necessary to fully examine the charges at hand before voting to confirm Judge Kavanaugh to the highest court in the land.

[Add your name if you agree that the Senate must NOT jam through a rushed vote on Judge Kavanaugh.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118f/3e0906/70e4a473/3e3610a8/3262279861/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180921_2_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree+that+the+Sena&utm_campaign=20180921_2_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition")

Thank you.

_-Ian_

Ian Sams
Communications Director
Kaine for Virginia | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f118f/3e0906/70e4a473/3e3610af/3262279861/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Kavanaugh?source=20180921_2_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=20180921_2_PET_IS_kavanaugh-petition")

name: Team Morse
subject: SHARE: Jessica’s record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
Team, earlier this week Jessica told you a story about a defining experience she had while working for USAID in Iraq--an experience that cemented her belief in the real impact that government can have on our lives, and our duty to make it work for everyday people.
It's important to make sure as many voters as possible hear about Jessica's commitment to bringing people together in order to serve our community and our country. [_**If you haven 't read her note already, please take a look below--then share this video that gives a deeper look into the values that shape her priorities and how she'll fight for us in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZJ_6zgG7I6e0bTbZ0tv30bjTITihQR32HFPTRqN3HyI=/Nv9P8UcGxfMKkPyrNILu3DGGsm4NIQwUs6-cJThxiC4=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZJ_6zgG7I6e0bTbZ0tv30bjTITihQR32HFPTRqN3HyI=/Nv9P8UcGxfMKkPyrNILu3DGGsm4NIQwUs6-cJThxiC4=)
Thank you,
Team Morse

\-----Begin forwarded message-----
From: Jessica Morse
Date: Wed, Sep 19, 2018
Subject: how I got here
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZJ_6zgG7I6e0bTbZ0tv30bjTITihQR32HFPTRqN3HyI=/NQlB9T_mBaUkqY3XjNT2mKKrb38tWgC6m-nU0v3iopo=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180921_TM_20180921-biovidkick_all_logo)
Peter: today, it's time to take a step back.
Our new TV ad is on the air, which shares a little about my priorities in Congress, but it's hard to fit the whole picture into a 30-second ad.
You know I'll fight for the community that raised me. **But beyond that --you can trust that I'm tough enough to get the job done by building coalitions in Washington.**
[_**To win in November, we have to reach as many voters as possible --chip in now to help us spread the word.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZJ_6zgG7I6e0bTbZ0tv30bjTITihQR32HFPTRqN3HyI=/MtJKqz4Ge8oACa-9BSkBsPtG-rtVs1JeH5IXK8RwpTE=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180921_TM_20180921-biovidkick_all_l1)
_**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZJ_6zgG7I6e0bTbZ0tv30bjTITihQR32HFPTRqN3HyI=/fC1MWsG6DesooP5kJf9PiQAwe5MUFHion8XlU9PbLEs=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180921_TM_20180921-biovidkick_all_i1)**_
**There 's no situation or challenge I'm afraid to take on.** When I served for over a year in Iraq with USAID, I faced gunfire from an Iraqi militia, I saw the aftermath of a chemical weapons attack on a village, and I faced rockets and mortars every day.
But one of my proudest accomplishments came after I discovered that some workers on our military base had been brought to Iraq via human trafficking. I was talking with service workers at the other military bases in Iraq and discovered, to my horror, that most of them were bonded laborers. Human trafficking had gone undetected because U.S. oversight and laws applied only to the first two layers of subcontractors.
I worked with a team to alert the right authorities, including a three-star general who was able to change Pentagon oversight rules and save the workers. Not satisfied with solving merely the immediate problem, after leaving Iraq I worked for the Congressional Commission on Wartime Contracting. We held these subcontractors accountable and changed U.S. laws and oversight rules to ensure that American tax dollars will never pay for human trafficking again.
**I 'll never forget how government actions affect real lives.**
It's been the greatest privilege of my life to serve our country at home and abroad over the course of my career. Now, I'm ready to fight for our community in Congress.
[_**Help me get there --chip in now to help us get our message out.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZJ_6zgG7I6e0bTbZ0tv30bjTITihQR32HFPTRqN3HyI=/MtJKqz4Ge8oACa-9BSkBsPtG-rtVs1JeH5IXK8RwpTE=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180921_TM_20180921-biovidkick_all_l2)
Thank you,
Jessica
[CONTRIBUTE ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZJ_6zgG7I6e0bTbZ0tv30bjTITihQR32HFPTRqN3HyI=/fC1MWsG6DesooP5kJf9PiQAwe5MUFHion8XlU9PbLEs=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180921_TM_20180921-biovidkick_all_contribbutton)

It's important to make sure as many voters as possible hear about Jessica's commitment to bringing people together in order to serve our community and our country. = = Thank you, Team Morse \-----Begin forwarded message----- From: Jessica Morse Date: Wed, Sep 19, 2018 Subject: how I got here Peter: today, it's time to take a step back. Our new TV ad is on the air, which shares a little about my priorities in Congress, but it's hard to fit the whole picture into a 30-second ad. You know I'll fight for the community that raised me. But beyond that --you can trust that I'm tough enough to get the job done by building coalitions in Washington. There 's no situation or challenge I'm afraid to take on. When I served for over a year in Iraq with USAID, I faced gunfire from an Iraqi militia, I saw the aftermath of a chemical weapons attack on a village, and I faced rockets and mortars every day. But one of my proudest accomplishments came after I discovered that some workers on our military base had been brought to Iraq via human trafficking. I was talking with service workers at the other military bases in Iraq and discovered, to my horror, that most of them were bonded laborers. Human trafficking had gone undetected because U.S. oversight and laws applied only to the first two layers of subcontractors. I worked with a team to alert the right authorities, including a three-star general who was able to change Pentagon oversight rules and save the workers. Not satisfied with solving merely the immediate problem, after leaving Iraq I worked for the Congressional Commission on Wartime Contracting. We held these subcontractors accountable and changed U.S. laws and oversight rules to ensure that American tax dollars will never pay for human trafficking again. I 'll never forget how government actions affect real lives. It's been the greatest privilege of my life to serve our country at home and abroad over the course of my career. Now, I'm ready to fight for our community in Congress. Thank you, Jessica Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. Jessica Morse for Congress 1079 Sunrise Ave Ste B 275 Roseville CA 95661 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.

subject: We need your help to reach our goal before a critical deadline
body:
** We are just $9,668 short!
------------------------------------------------------------
We are coming close to a critical deadline. September marks the end of the 3rd quarter and it is one of the last reporting periods before the election. We have seen a surge of support since the shocking primary turnout, but we are still just short of reaching our September goal.

It is critical that we close out September with the funds we need to Get Out the Vote, and to send a message that our campaign is bringing a serious challenge to a historically red seat. Donate today to send a message that 2018 is a year for change!

Friend, I know what the media says.

They say we can’t do it. They say we can’t win in November. They say it’s impossible.

But here are the facts: They were wrong about President Trump and Senator Ron Johnson in 2016 and they were wrong about us in the primary. Is it it any shock they’re WRONG now?

I know we’re winners, Friend. And if we work together, we can defeat Tammy Baldwin.

But it’s time to get real.

We MUST step up our fundraising efforts and give it all we've got to prevent a Baldwin victory. That’s why I’m putting together an EMERGENCY FUND to get us through the next few weeks without any gaps in our efforts.

We know Tammy Baldwin is cashing big checks from liberal, San Francisco donors and her bank account is staying full with plenty of cash to attack us.

So we have to be out there doing everything we can to motivate conservatives, spread our message, and get out the vote.

I know Wisconsinites voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump last November. And I know Tammy Baldwin chooses to obstruct that agenda. She won’t confirm judges who uphold the Constitution. She stands in the way of providing patients with more healthcare options and lower prices. And Friend, she didn’t even vote for tax reform!

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=FhSlOs6TmO94eOpc5fpmjRXaM52kZqqBh_H0ovLKf45UaWOeEM3-e3FsECx-Qm6ftfn2ext4hRlJHZdXPYfYdnONhzTiRDzKKCG-dFNTpnwfHurKIVsFbXvhtDnDpPPv_DrY0pl_Cq1W5QirwBO4XuMlBG2pYuNo7UlZIup8vaLLk1v2UasonGoDYrE9ILwbxP2CbdSQVe3Fx1Z1FGxeMoOrPMFtslbciAIgZiK6NHKBLKnzbKZUqvaIZg29hPSy). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=N48yvWZAU0bUyq3yrIQQhjtn-ASbPqt5hF44o0oObKlT3aONH7mjTnY-1sHznAXsJ37B2S9LHMz31LvQErDHfyfYgD_pxGDJMkY3qIkVSD3Ewq7IshBhlM5mMPPkkrULfYlCs6msYQQand1a-jLO_9OI8Hr5K7TKMqa3zZ51oa5xL_5o1h8Bl_n-guxK9MNxtyGm3Yp1AF8EXU30VE8jwsfxAvJw90k7yIe_rSTrP9IZN44nGGSjdj2aNyeZ0ywqN5jWPXv7vh-yRiDryq0MlCo_Mlt_EY3hKlOjf1wZW-RQo9c1SSNo_AiS7Dj9RXhNkI5Ts3_C4NbzEDTXV3MbNaizxBN6PW9dhpnNjaQsD-i9p2G03xy-hFvrYxjrNoFZ) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=N48yvWZAU0bUyq3yrIQQhjtn-ASbPqt5hF44o0oObKn_OUKMPJFPrz6HSwnVDabkRjAoIioBBpBFSdGhKEyCLHSRxPkhVGCWKd5Bln82qqoWrvr7JwXiryNVx1Sz1RJbZ-Qp5QjHydXmtm2WneVOpOhk-swdSDsMpp7wTI1C2WuW1tLZ112rpA7mh_gpI_0bxLNTZmuoEZllbGZtZYJemUjtCcUa4bMFaf_LxDuSKdcbsazg8WpfkeGqbUfME5EpW53uP696NUSXr-V2ptNMOneOiZ4Q3Yij3HKfK3zFj6EI1bKLr_f8IGvuMoRmNq9uK12JdRSIstDBBNtCbTzMyB-P4DgfdxRfUcI5PuzE9lUzO8IsEBIisiRwGAC-jJWr) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=N48yvWZAU0bUyq3yrIQQhjzbuLtJ3paxJPOXigibU43o1mYa6AvxJIqgh6fdg8Brs681WNfByeso3y9SW3qyJY6NGDDiWn6k9Bl2PsXUMH1i9fIFnIYEtH70iPEptm0sL1lRGH5sGZxFY0HKI4syg1kJkbwbjbck8imLQrBST8A8HdQH9vWo8ibtmm6CQmrb_r2_JNjLxGZ-Myhcw7mnCZDoblNjfE-ijL7yJH6jvdJK2QI9yWdlQx9MNpSszo4Y-ISPQnJHpRpZJBQK16S3gQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=N48yvWZAU0bUyq3yrIQQhgQxe0adiy7bfKTUvxSy5MW1StFvTblrYWdvhd64L2ozUF96fOAMcRkCFjkQ_MiWdlVteyeze-Jo-r8kZ8FeU2yElXt_5oNUNZDmrbhbogBtQZ8sUUTSPUG_rtltL8b-jbiImKxmMNFtFMzu7Zcl4yzWAYzQnSo8XfunLR07260PjSH0JotldAlxMGNBkb1_k0Ej8xzxlyiM4t7ck7ZOi0PLq1cYXIc0GL_GtUEAcA0RTbHbZ34376U0PfNN9oYRPw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=N48yvWZAU0bUyq3yrIQQhg124BTJZnikwWu3gRwT49EjVYpZi0nLglCVJmfXwJeaiT0UUUUjL-uMkKokvhwRycnjqx0lj4YWKa5YKmNzpcc3_8jj2oC5PNKP36NLgyqzoCA--M1euMUC3tar9WVI5x7DXiqsznlY7h-_m7x_KXrTo5nAueV9pf6AgtV41VFQwJeWviTP1zfhgkos7cdcvHV_bjEwb7VCXYg50x9vG66bSR6ZHWIgbOIogat8InP_2LVburUy58LMOHJT2zXX-Q%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=N48yvWZAU0bUyq3yrIQQhjtn-ASbPqt5hF44o0oObKnNFqHDcjsDt0V5U2yQ-p_S2XvgZi16pIVXPdViNwG3Gpz7xToObVigeSFKo7NJ9pdfA2oZaQB0ySlP5IvexzP9vcXCO-aktcE28iZPQVzJxN9zd1_Vru_6wUQV_JhwNseYYeAuZ456qjtnBLS_DuA5YL7KwVC2zw-KKMzZ1pi86nunjUZoblxmnJANXlQTzHxgHijwDIj5yN9eRGurgCGKJ41jSQ4Pp467JXD2ZkGQFfgXttHRqFgoSlewAPcnHo-WzN6QuoU8okrHyGBsVorOAlcSPAfXFj522l-kkQdhLzlthOcmNbX5NR40Wu7_6uw5zi1yxYkJRuZvhDRh0sT4nVDdjLg_Np3g6mrb7v-C1Q%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=FhSlOs6TmO94eOpc5fpmjRXaM52kZqqBh_H0ovLKf45UaWOeEM3-e3FsECx-Qm6ftfn2ext4hRlJHZdXPYfYdnONhzTiRDzKKCG-dFNTpnwfHurKIVsFbXvhtDnDpPPv_DrY0pl_Cq1W5QirwBO4XuMlBG2pYuNo7UlZIup8vaLLk1v2UasonGoDYrE9ILwbxP2CbdSQVe3Fx1Z1FGxeMoOrPMFtslbciAIgZiK6NHKBLKnzbKZUqvaIZg29hPSy) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c589c6fbb2e43cbbfc44687eafc89eb&_e=FhSlOs6TmO94eOpc5fpmjRXaM52kZqqBh_H0ovLKf45UaWOeEM3-e3FsECx-Qm6ftfn2ext4hRlJHZdXPYfYdnONhzTiRDzKKCG-dFNTpnwfHurKIVsFbXvhtDnDpPPv_DrY0pl_Cq1W5QirwBO4XuMlBG2pYuNo7UlZIup8vaLLk1v2UasonGoDYrE9ILwbxP2CbdSQVe3Fx1Z1FGxeMoOrPMFtslbciAIgZiK6NHKBLKnzbKZUqvaIZg29hPSy) to unsubscribe. clean_body: We're getting to the final weeks of our campaign and we MUST be prepared for anything Senator Baldwin will throw at us. Friend, We're getting to the final weeks of our campaign and we MUST be prepared for anything Senator Baldwin will throw at us. My team and I put together an emergency fund to help out. Can you contribute today to make sure we have everything we need to continue FULL-SPEED AHEAD? Every penny we have now will be used to help share our message and DEFEAT Tammy Baldwin. I can’t tell you how important this is. Our race could be the difference between a Republican majority, and a Democrat one. Please, chip in today to help us succeed: Appreciate it, Friend. Leah \-----forwarded message below----- Friend, I know what the media says. They say we can’t do it. They say we can’t win in November. They say it’s impossible. But here are the facts: They were wrong about President Trump and Senator Ron Johnson in 2016 and they were wrong about us in the primary. Is it it any shock they’re WRONG now? I know we’re winners, Friend. And if we work together, we can defeat Tammy Baldwin. But it’s time to get real. We MUST step up our fundraising efforts and give it all we've got to prevent a Baldwin victory. That’s why I’m putting together an EMERGENCY FUND to get us through the next few weeks without any gaps in our efforts. We know Tammy Baldwin is cashing big checks from liberal, San Francisco donors and her bank account is staying full with plenty of cash to attack us. So we have to be out there doing everything we can to motivate conservatives, spread our message, and get out the vote. I know Wisconsinites voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump last November. And I know Tammy Baldwin chooses to obstruct that agenda. She won’t confirm judges who uphold the Constitution. She stands in the way of providing patients with more healthcare options and lower prices. And Friend, she didn’t even vote for tax reform! And I want every Wisconsinite to hear it, too! Tammy Baldwin has let us down, and she can’t hide from her record as long as we’re out there making it loud and clear. I know I can’t do it without you, Friend. Your support means everything. Thank you in advance. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Tori Taylor
subject: Fwd: BIG NEWS -- This race is a toss-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
| | I wanted to make sure you saw Kathy's message about some very exciting news! **All the hard work has paid off and we 've made this race a TOSS-UP.** It's clear we have the momentum and the drive to win. Now all we need are the resources. [**Will you help us out with a donation of $5?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427951/e3b7d3/5d4c3581/255542d8/3570522434/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180921?refcode=kme180921_m&recurring=true") Thanks! Tori Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kathy Manning
Date: Fri, Sep 21, 2018
Subject: BIG NEWS -- This race is a toss-up |
---
Sorry for using all caps just then, but this is an all-caps exciting moment:
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427951/e3b7d3/5d4c3581/255542d8/3570522434/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180921?refcode=kme180921_m&recurring=true")
---
**We have big news to share: Nate Silver 's _FiveThirtyEight_ now has our race listed as a TOSS-UP.**
We have the momentum and the drive to win. Now all we need is the resources.
[**With just a few days left until the last FEC Quarter deadline of the election, we're still short of our $65,000 online goal. Can you rush in a contribution?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427951/e3b7d3/5d4c3581/255542d8/3570522434/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180921?refcode=kme180921_m&recurring=true")
This ratings change is a good sign. But we're not the only ones who can read signs.
Two outside groups backed by the President and Paul Ryan are set to spend big money against us in the final weeks of the campaign. A group backed by the Koch brothers is about to do the same.
**Outside special interest groups will spend whatever they can to keep Rep. Ted Budd fighting for them in the House.** They think an influx of outside, dark money can buy them momentum and a victory in November.
Let's prove them wrong.
[**Give whatever amount you can and help us reach our $65,000 online FEC goal.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427951/e3b7d3/5d4c3581/255542d8/3570522434/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180921?refcode=kme180921_m&recurring=true")
I'm more fired up than ever before. All of our door knocking, phone banking, registering voters, and talking to people -- is working. I know if we keep at it, we can win in November.
Thank you all for your incredible support.
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427951/e3b7d3/5d4c3581/255542df/3570522434/VEsD/ "https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe") [www.kathymanning2018.com](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427951/e3b7d3/5d4c3581/255542de/3570522434/VEsA/ "https://www.kathymanning2018.com/")

name: Team Sisolak
subject: New poll — bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TwzAaFPI6q0kkymb124w8mmSbmzLMhTE8lAxp7XeCsU=/Dnu5POQUY-Xhs7WH3d13O7GR2m9J4-2MQtxPeGSoF4c=?gpsid=37_57_3803&refcode=em18_180921_ipsos_LG_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_ipsos_LG_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---

**_Ipsos/Reuters_ poll:
Sisolak 40% -- Laxalt 43%**

If you're with us, step up now to help close the gap:
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/TwzAaFPI6q0kkymb124w8mmSbmzLMhTE8lAxp7XeCsU=/Dnu5POQUY-Xhs7WH3d13O7GR2m9J4-2MQtxPeGSoF4c=?gpsid=37_57_3803&refcode=em18_180921_ipsos_B1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_ipsos_B1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

Dear Friend,

A new poll just came out showing Steve down three points to Adam Laxalt. That's right -- while a poll last week showed Steve ahead, this new poll from _Ipsos/Reuters_ shows Steve behind.

**The one thing we are sure of is that this election is razor close.**

**[We've got to keep fighting to get Steve's message out to every voter. Chip in $5 or more now to help us do it.](https://act.myngp.com/el/TwzAaFPI6q0kkymb124w8mmSbmzLMhTE8lAxp7XeCsU=/Dnu5POQUY-Xhs7WH3d13O7GR2m9J4-2MQtxPeGSoF4c=?gpsid=37_57_3803&refcode=em18_180921_ipsos_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_ipsos_L1_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

This campaign isn't about watching the news, waiting for the wind to blow this way or that -- we're here to fight for real solutions to the real problems Nevadans are facing.

Overcrowded classrooms. Innocent lives taken by preventable gun violence. Medical bills that ruin families' finances, and even throw them into bankruptcy. Teachers working minimum wage jobs on the side just to make ends meet.

Steve's campaign is about building a better Nevada for these people and everyone else. But this race is still a dead heat, so we need you to step up right now.

**[Please don't let us fall further behind Lackey Laxalt. Chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Steve win the only poll that counts: the one on Election Day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/TwzAaFPI6q0kkymb124w8mmSbmzLMhTE8lAxp7XeCsU=/Dnu5POQUY-Xhs7WH3d13O7GR2m9J4-2MQtxPeGSoF4c=?gpsid=37_57_3803&refcode=em18_180921_ipsos_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_ipsos_L2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Thanks,

Team Sisolak

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/TwzAaFPI6q0kkymb124w8mmSbmzLMhTE8lAxp7XeCsU=/Dnu5POQUY-Xhs7WH3d13O7GR2m9J4-2MQtxPeGSoF4c=?gpsid=37_57_3803&refcode=em18_180921_ipsos_B2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_ipsos_B2_fnd_gq_act__TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
---
Friends for Steve Sisolak
P.O. Box 850
Las Vegas NV 89125 United States
