name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Hey, I'll fight the NRA and win
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e2/9e00690/5d7a9c48/24016ac5/1104117727/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Friends,

Today, I was honored to be endorsed by Moms Demand Action for Gun Sense in America, an organization founded by moms in response to the devastating shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School.

If you've been following me for a while, you know that I do more than talk about the epidemic of gun violence. From Sandy Hook, to Las Vegas, to Marjory Stoneman Douglas, to my city of Tallahassee, there is simply too much bloodshed from guns.

And tragically, we know that the gun lobby is standing in the way of keeping our families and fellow citizens safer. I know this because they tried to silence me when I refused to repeal a seemingly innocuous law in Tallahassee that banned guns from our public parks. The gun lobby sued me and the other members of our city council, but fortunately, we won that fight in court.

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e2/9e00690/5d7a9c48/24016ac4/1104117727/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mom-demand-ag?gpsid=13_55_3799&refcode=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2")
Across our state and nation, the gun lobby still holds tremendous power -- and my opponent, Ron DeSantis, does whatever the NRA wants. DeSantis even said he would have vetoed the common-sense gun-safety laws that Governor Rick Scott signed into law after Marjory Stoneman Douglas.

DeSantis has made it clear he'll fight for the gun lobby instead of our kids and communities.

Unlike DeSantis, I'll fight for a ban on assault weapons and large capacity magazines. I'll strengthen and require universal background checks for all gun sales. I'll close private sale loopholes, restrict gun access for the mentally ill and known foreign and domestic terrorists, and close the "Boyfriend Loophole."

I've fought the powerful gun lobby in court twice and won -- and as your Governor, I'll fight the NRA and win again.

**[Today, I'm asking you to make a contribution of $3 or more to help elect me on Tuesday, November 6 so we can protect our kids and communities from senseless gun violence.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e2/9e00690/5d7a9c48/24016ac7/1104117727/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mom-demand-ag?gpsid=13_55_3799&refcode=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+FIRSTNAMEToday+Im+asking+you+to+make+a+c")**

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e2/9e00690/5d7a9c48/24016ac6/1104117727/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mom-demand-ag?gpsid=13_55_3799&refcode=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e2/9e00690/5d7a9c48/24016ad9/1104117727/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e2/9e00690/5d7a9c48/24016ad8/1104117727/VEsA/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36e2/9e00690/5d7a9c48/24016adb/1104117727/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180921_MDA1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")

name: MK
subject: We just got a lifeline (but we need your help)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
I need your help, friends: **My campaign is up against the corporate special interests bankrolling Governor Chris Sununu, including more than $50,000 in campaign contributions from our state's utility company, Eversource.**

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Working across the aisle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
Peter,

Finding solutions in Congress today is harder than ever. With gridlock and threats of government shutdowns, it's a wonder that Congress manages to pass anything nowadays.

Fortunately, I've been working with a dynamic group of Congressmen and Congresswomen laser focused on passing bipartisan solutions.

[**Will you join me in fighting for common sense compromises?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/36BySGkvgo4uW4SbC7EzO_rz5dQJXg_HZjWoIwbiI_w=/_trpCMbJGwAQcU5P8nE3aG1yzPz4RELPhnOVbGIX1DE=)

Our most recent proposal is a change to the way Congress runs itself. We call these rule changes "Break the Gridlock". These new rules would allow for greater debate between parties and stop extremists from halting the legislative process.

[**Party extremists and career politicians have controlled the way Congress functions for too long. Sign your name to bring Congress back to reality.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/36BySGkvgo4uW4SbC7EzO_rz5dQJXg_HZjWoIwbiI_w=/_trpCMbJGwAQcU5P8nE3aG1yzPz4RELPhnOVbGIX1DE=)

Thanks,

Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Turning up the heat
body:
Indiana's temperatures aren't the only thing that was hot this week. It's campaign season, and Indiana Republican are turning up the heat in races... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/turning-up-the-heat?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ce99c42135&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Turning Up the Heat_** Indiana's temperatures weren't the only thing that was hot this week! It's campaign season, and Indiana Republican are turning up the heat in races statewide...and we're making Democrat Joe Donnelly sweat.

Early voting begins in a matter of WEEKS, and our Indiana Republican team is running on all cylinders to make sure voters know about our right track Republican team!

You'll see it on the airwaves, as **Mike Braun** released not just one, but TWO ads this week. The first ad, [Won't Wait,](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=75c6946cdc&e=1acd9bb3d6) shows how**Mike Braun** didn’t wait for the government to give us health care solutions – he built them himself for employees at his southern Indiana-based company.

And the second ad, [Downhill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=01eeb79caa&e=1acd9bb3d6), presents a strong contrast between these two candidates. While **Mike Braun** has been building his successful business here in Indiana, Democrat Joe Donnelly has been in DC serving as a vote in the pocket of his Democrat bosses Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer. Whether he's supporting Obama's disastrous Iran Deal or voting AGAINST President Trump's tax cuts, Democrat Donnelly isn't working for us.

Check out the two ads below! Hoosier Republicans are on our way to victory...and we're turning up the heat! -Kyle Hupfer

Pictured: Mike Braun grabs a bite with Iowa Senator Joni Ernst in Indiana on Wednesday...and then they held a rally together in Indianapolis later in the day!
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Taking Indiana to the World: Italian Edition_**
When **Governor Eric Holcomb** says that he’s taking Indiana to the world, he means it!

This week, he’s on a three-day economic development mission to Italy, and our economies actually have a lot in common. We’re both manufacturing hubs, with an emphasis on the automotive industry. And, of course, we both love auto racing.

**Governor Holcomb** is meeting with the Italian companies that help power Indiana’s economy with their operations here...and this week, he personally welcomed the 31st Italian company to Indiana. He broke news this week that Milan-based (the _other_ Milan, pronounced a little differently) Filtrec, a manufacturer of filters and filter elements, will locate its first U.S. operation in Indiana! The company is bringing a $1.3 million investment to the state...along with 25 new high-wage jobs.

Indiana's economy is on a roll, and it's certainly a great time to be a Hoosier!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=10327ed3c6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
[ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=335c4a263c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Mike Braun at Work!_**
What a WEEK! Whether you’re at a grassroots event or watching TV, you’ll likely see **Mike Braun** , who is hard at work talking with voters and sharing our winning message across the state.

It was an honor to welcome Iowa Senator Joni Ernst (check out [this video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=917479a474&e=1acd9bb3d6), here) to campaign alongside **Mike Braun** on his Solutions Tour. And then the campaign released not one...but TWO...new ads this week!
* [Won't Wait](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8236fd1740&e=1acd9bb3d6): This is a great ad! If Hoosiers were wondering the difference between Democrat Joe Donnelly and **Mike Braun** , they'll see it crystal clear here. While Democrat Donnelly keeps voting to keep Obamacare on the books, **Mike Braun** wasn't waiting on the government for a solution to our health care problems. Instead, he worked to deliver affordable health care to employees at his business...and didn't raise premiums for 10 years!

* [Downhill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=446550935a&e=1acd9bb3d6): This is also a great ad that you'll really want to watch and share with your family and friends. While a member of the U.S. House of Representatives, Democrat Donnelly voted for Nancy Pelosi to be Speaker of the House. And then as our Senator, he went on to support Obama's Iran Deal and voted against President Trump's tax cuts. And he think he represents Hoosiers?!?

**Mike Braun** is hard at work...so let's help him make sure all Hoosiers hear this winning message!
---
|
---
| | **_Indiana Fact of the Week_**
---
|
---
| **_Indiana is on a Roll!_**
Earlier this week, [Inside Indiana Business reported](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=060567a08d&e=1acd9bb3d6) that Indiana’s average wage is growing at the ninth fastest rate in the nation!

The average wage in Indiana in 2017 was $46,424 per year, up from $44,750 per year in 2016. Considering Indiana's low cost of living, those extra dollars will go even further in Indiana!

Companies across the state are growing, and they're continuing to create more great jobs for Hoosiers!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_National Day of Action was a SUCCESS!_** Thank you to each and every one of you who helped knock on doors and make phone calls last weekend for the National Day of Action! Because of you (and 200 volunteers!), we contacted nearly 40,000 Hoosiers across Indiana on Saturday alone. With that work, we've now contacted 1.2 million Hoosiers this year... sharing the Republican team's message of providing great government services to all Hoosiers!

Want to get in on the action? [Fill out this form here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4dbc6e98f9&e=1acd9bb3d6), and someone from our team will be in touch soon!
---
|
---

clean_body: Indiana's temperatures aren't the only thing that was hot this week. It's campaign season, and Indiana Republican are turning up the heat in races... | | | | | | | | Turning Up the Heat Indiana's temperatures weren't the only thing that was hot this week! It's campaign season, and Indiana Republican are turning up the heat in races statewide...and we're making Democrat Joe Donnelly sweat. Early voting begins in a matter of WEEKS, and our Indiana Republican team is running on all cylinders to make sure voters know about our right track Republican team! You'll see it on the airwaves, as Mike Braun released not just one, but TWO ads this week. The first ad, shows howMike Braun didn’t wait for the government to give us health care solutions – he built them himself for employees at his southern Indiana-based company. And the second ad, , presents a strong contrast between these two candidates. While Mike Braun has been building his successful business here in Indiana, Democrat Joe Donnelly has been in DC serving as a vote in the pocket of his Democrat bosses Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer. Whether he's supporting Obama's disastrous Iran Deal or voting AGAINST President Trump's tax cuts, Democrat Donnelly isn't working for us. Check out the two ads below! Hoosier Republicans are on our way to victory...and we're turning up the heat! -Kyle Hupfer Pictured: Mike Braun grabs a bite with Iowa Senator Joni Ernst in Indiana on Wednesday...and then they held a rally together in Indianapolis later in the day! | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | Taking Indiana to the World: Italian Edition When Governor Eric Holcomb says that he’s taking Indiana to the world, he means it! This week, he’s on a three-day economic development mission to Italy, and our economies actually have a lot in common. We’re both manufacturing hubs, with an emphasis on the automotive industry. And, of course, we both love auto racing. Governor Holcomb is meeting with the Italian companies that help power Indiana’s economy with their operations here...and this week, he personally welcomed the 31st Italian company to Indiana. He broke news this week that Milan-based (the other Milan, pronounced a little differently) Filtrec, a manufacturer of filters and filter elements, will locate its first U.S. operation in Indiana! The company is bringing a $1.3 million investment to the state...along with 25 new high-wage jobs. Indiana's economy is on a roll, and it's certainly a great time to be a Hoosier! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Mike Braun at Work! What a WEEK! Whether you’re at a grassroots event or watching TV, you’ll likely see Mike Braun , who is hard at work talking with voters and sharing our winning message across the state. It was an honor to welcome Iowa Senator Joni Ernst (check out , here) to campaign alongside Mike Braun on his Solutions Tour. And then the campaign released not one...but TWO...new ads this week! : This is a great ad! If Hoosiers were wondering the difference between Democrat Joe Donnelly and Mike Braun , they'll see it crystal clear here. While Democrat Donnelly keeps voting to keep Obamacare on the books, Mike Braun wasn't waiting on the government for a solution to our health care problems. Instead, he worked to deliver affordable health care to employees at his business...and didn't raise premiums for 10 years! : This is also a great ad that you'll really want to watch and share with your family and friends. While a member of the U.S. House of Representatives, Democrat Donnelly voted for Nancy Pelosi to be Speaker of the House. And then as our Senator, he went on to support Obama's Iran Deal and voted against President Trump's tax cuts. And he think he represents Hoosiers?!? Mike Braun is hard at work...so let's help him make sure all Hoosiers hear this winning message! | | | Indiana Fact of the Week | | Indiana is on a Roll! Earlier this week, that Indiana’s average wage is growing at the ninth fastest rate in the nation! The average wage in Indiana in 2017 was $46,424 per year, up from $44,750 per year in 2016. Considering Indiana's low cost of living, those extra dollars will go even further in Indiana! Companies across the state are growing, and they're continuing to create more great jobs for Hoosiers! | | | | National Day of Action was a SUCCESS! Thank you to each and every one of you who helped knock on doors and make phone calls last weekend for the National Day of Action! Because of you (and 200 volunteers!), we contacted nearly 40,000 Hoosiers across Indiana on Saturday alone. With that work, we've now contacted 1.2 million Hoosiers this year... sharing the Republican team's message of providing great government services to all Hoosiers! Want to get in on the action? , and someone from our team will be in touch soon! | | Upcoming Republican Events : Hancock County Fall BBQ " or tap to follow the link": Delaware County Lincoln Day Dinner : Jennings County Lincoln Day Dinner : Vermilion County Lincoln Day Dinner : Orange County Fall Dinner : Kosciusko County Republican Semi-Annual Fish Fry : Clay County BBQ & Pie Auction : Crawford County Republican Underground Lincoln Day Dinner : Laconia Festival Booth & Parade : Wabash County Republican Fall Dinner : Annual Kosciusko County Republican Hall of Fame Dinner : Halloween Parade in Corydon | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Secretary of State Connie Lawson Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Senator Todd Young Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Todd Rokita Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Luke Messer Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | **[Hey there, I just got off the stage tonight after speaking with President Obama and receiving his endorsement.](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-obama-endorse?utm_campaign=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1__&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEHey+there+I+just+got+off+the+st")**

President Obama knows what's at stake this November. And he knows that Pennsylvania is a critical state for Democrats to win if we are going to protect the progress we've made.

I'm honored to have his endorsement, and it means so much to me that so many of you are with President Obama and me. **[We're in the final stretch of our campaign. So I'm asking, will you stand with President Obama in support of my campaign, and chip in $5 or $10 today?](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-obama-endorse?utm_campaign=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1__&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=2+-+Wersquore+in+the+final+stretch+of+our+ca")** | | [**$5**](https://secure.wolfforpa. President Obama led our country forward. Under his leadership, we:
* Ensured that every American has access to affordable health care,
* Legalized marriage equality,
* Protected a woman's right to choose from Republican attacks,
* And made it easier to exercise our right to vote.

It's so important to protect these values so we can keep moving Pennsylvania forward. That's why I've stood up as the last line of defense for President Obama's legacy and for all of our democratic values.

**[But my opponent Scott Wagner wants to undo all of the progress President Obama made and that I have made over the past three years.](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-obama-endorse?utm_campaign=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1__&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=14+-+But+my+opponent+Scott+Wagner+wants+to+un")**

He supports Donald Trump and the Republican majorities that want to turn their backs on Pennsylvania families, working people, the LGBTQ community, seniors, women, and our students and children.

That's why your support is more important now than ever. We cannot afford to sit on the sidelines. We need to give this election our all.

**[So please take action. Help us keep up the fight, and chip in $5 right away:](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-obama-endorse?utm_campaign=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1__&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=15+-+So+please+FIRSTNAMEtake+action+Help+us+k")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Obama-Endorsement](https://secure.wolfforpa. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-obama-endorse?utm_campaign=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&refcode=em18_180921_obama-endorsement_fnd_clq_act_em1__&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amount=25&utm_content=16+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomObamaEndorsement")**

Thanks,

Tom

Friend,

Last night's debate was an eye opener.

While I came to talk about the real issues, to address things that really matter to California families, Josh Harder came to make things up.

He doesn't want to quote my real record because we know the truth...

The policies I've fought for have protected our water, created more jobs, made your taxes lower, and boosted our economy. Saying otherwise is a complete stretch of the truth.

And at a certain point you stretch the truth and it just becomes a lie.

I'm happy I was able to get out there and go straight to the public with the truth about the hard work I'm doing in D.C. and it's clear we came out on top.

I hope you'll join me today to share our message and celebrate last night's debate victory by chipping in $25 to our DEFEAT HARDER FUND: **[https://secure.jeffdenham.com/donate/](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=74eebfc4b48b4e6d8022979cadfa6388&_e=wotfDcHVd7pmW18Gr21ZLiQ5FvtrBl5OOF8-3TbBVbRG49w_MTUPXqEFJ9b5xGBrt_S4oSzYfAS3trowCnOb2rA0F8XGLXMpO0ARH-FJvtu6ilWgIGgA4Ln4OpLCx6sv_moIifm4kesDeSJ57rYZ68_PTxni9xLJ1NXKU_GToHwquXSVtZnq_4GJv8kKTNnNX5zY5l4rhcZI-sPN3WjjIoGyJBGi-Ey-qt4Et7LJpPQKfiYrhutcM0VmeEZnqFpk2dndJr-kP_wRJNODhl5b76doPhORuGtKOf8kSxT-kogix3-kdE-GiuNlBK9gqFK4gCz2oBjKwN_8OPS0MW0gXLbJWyyMRhqr3d7JayYAFDRXYBZRtxLTM8bg-PuW34h77ixyj_V7uyRjvibBmWEAD8QBx143ZYJH-muMQVWMSqFQzqJKbQ8JGhE9I_EeyXsy)**

We’ve got to get things fixed in Washington still and I’m not going to allow somebody to make up stories or falsify the truth - I’m going to fight on the issues that are important to me - to you - and California.

I hope you'll fight with me, friend.

Jeff
[CHIP IN NOW](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=74eebfc4b48b4e6d8022979cadfa6388&_e=wotfDcHVd7pmW18Gr21ZLiQ5FvtrBl5OOF8-3TbBVbRg670lTF6sklM_yQs2TMwy98FRFAJcsK5V0RPjGECefu-1tUisoJEiBMdsDAIMmoODZ6qF12nVT36Y6VEosfBp-atchwERz7HfZlH83OlohYu25eJeNjhodLJXY_MsuGME238ZEUdkshP28uc03alVhEzikqBKFTS4f4qIVkmudnjp7ozt-Ox4HVPfA_4lfdvNZd1Pd3TQvDf-aQTQaAeO4IZfkq_XfN9Y6546r6jJiaExbvwMTyYI9R44stzKa-pA-ci8-ZiKbtHWzyCSUhymymKTcj1FGNhjYxPYmUP4gMR3G_UFeULTT-eIO6zVBFxcUX3tWK61tG9e9EwTaUKEqoxLKYMX8KsuDTk9dWoPocFryAUK3RQ6fkRqT1BCdRc%3D)

| | | **Update for you:** Earlier this week, we set a challenge to raise $50,000 for our Media Fund. Right now, we're less than $10,000 from reaching our goal.

Keeping our television ads on the air is a MUST if we're going to re-elect Martin and keep his Senate seat blue. **_[Contribute to our Media Fund before midnight tonight so we can keep our ads running across New Mexico!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-media-fund-sept?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+to+our+Media+Fund+before+midn&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180921_2_6&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180921_2_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180921_2_6")_**

**We 're less than one month out from the start of early voting in New Mexico, meaning the countdown is on to reach voters before ballots are cast.**

That's why reaching our budget goal for our Media Fund before midnight tonight is so critical. If we don't keep these ads on the air, we could miss out on reaching voters before they go to the polls.

[](http://nm.martinheinrich. Martin's television ads focus on the issues that matter most to New Mexicans -- increasing access to health care, growing our economy and jobs, and protecting our public lands.

**With Gary Johnson and super PACs poised to launch ads of their own soon, it 's vital we keep getting the truth out about Martin's record and values.**
